title: principal.snapshot.json
description: Identity snapshot for the single principal (operator) of a trust-gate deployment. The principal is the only interlocutor granted tool access and Gate bypass.

version.description: Monotonic version number. Increment on every snapshot update. Used by the plugin to invalidate cached copies.

principal_discord_id.description: Discord snowflake (numeric string, 17-20 digits) of the principal's primary account.

principal_discord_username_hint.description: Display-name hint used for impersonation detection. Not authoritative; the snowflake is the trust anchor.

alt_ids.description: Additional snowflakes that also resolve to the principal (alt accounts, testing accounts). Treated identically to principal_discord_id.
